title: Lead Investment Banker at HDFC Life Insurance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at HDFC Life Insurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, HDFC Life Insurance in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Life Insurance:
HDFC Life Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Life Insurance!
